steps.title: Set up the equation
steps.content:
We want to find $x$ such that $g(x) = 76$. Substitute 76 into the function definition $g(x) = 2x - 148$:
$$2x - 148 = 76$$

steps.title: Solve for x
steps.content:
Add 148 to both sides to isolate the term with $x$:
$$2x = 224$$
Then divide both sides by 2:
$$x = 112$$
